title: Useful Ribbits
description: A standalone extension to the Ribbits mod that adds helpful ribbits who work for you.
body:
⚠️ Informations :

This mod is a complement, not an addon, to the Ribbits mod by joosh_7889.
It is designed to be fully playable on its own, but it can also extend the experience if used together with the original Ribbits mod.

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/WyDbuzMVKZ) server if you want to contact me for suggestions, help, or bug reports.

📜 Description :

Useful Ribbits adds various helpful or decorative Ribbits to your Minecraft world :

Chef Ribbit : Takes meat and fish from a Ribbit Chest and automatically cooks them in a smoker.
⚒️ Crafts :
Ribbit Bed : 

With the Ribbits mod :

![With the Ribbit Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb20cf5526e18f6f3eb0c92e10ef4ae8888044df.png)

Without the Ribbits mod :

![Without the Ribbit Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2bab1eea9fe368d1e2eda586fcef95424bb3556.png)


Ribbit Chest :

![Ribbit Chest Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72745eaa516407ff09a10ae3a08950cfaf74cc4b.png)


🌍 Languages :
English (en_us) -default
English (en_gb)
French (fr_fr)
📝 Feedback & Bug Reports :

   I’d love to hear your feedback!
   If you encounter any bugs or issues, please don’t hesitate to report them.
   Suggestions and ideas are also very welcome!

   Community, support, suggestions & bug reports : https://discord.gg/WyDbuzMVKZ
